areas.reason: SaaS products need clear value proposition, pricing, MVP, and roadmap boundaries.
SaaS products usually include owners, admins, staff, and customers.
Tenant isolation and ownership rules are central to SaaS architecture.
Billing is common for SaaS but can be deferred for internal or pilot products.
SaaS teams need a controlled operational surface for users, plans, and support.
AI capabilities should be activated only when the product needs them.
